products.title: Champion® Powerblend® Pullover Hoodie - Light Steel

description.plain: A moisture-wicking, breathable pullover hoodie made from a cotton-poly blend for all-day comfort.

unique_selling_points: Features double dry technology and a two-ply hood for superior moisture management and warmth.
metadata.top_features:
Double dry technology wicks moisture to keep you dry during activity
Two-ply hood with dyed-to-match drawcords provides extra warmth and secure fit
1x1 rib knit sleeve cuffs and hem enhance fit and durability
Front pouch pocket offers convenient storage for essentials
Embroidered Champion C logo at left cuff adds signature style
metadata.tech_specs:
Weight: 9 oz
Material: 50-50 US-grown cotton, polyester
Alternative material: 50-40-10 cotton, polyester, black polyester
Lightweight alternative: 50-48-2 cotton, polyester, black polyester, silver grey
Sleeve length: Long
Sizes: S, M, L, XL, XXL, XXXL, 4XL

products.title: Champion® Powerblend® Pullover Hoodie - Light Steel

description.plain: A moisture-wicking, durable hoodie with a two-ply hood and premium cotton blend for everyday comfort.

unique_selling_points: Double Dry technology wicks moisture for lasting comfort during active or casual wear.
metadata.top_features:
Double Dry technology wicks moisture to keep you dry and comfortable
Two-ply hood with dyed-to-match drawcords for enhanced coverage and fit
1x1 rib knit sleeve cuffs and hem provide a secure, comfortable fit
Front pouch pocket for convenient storage
Embroidered Champion C logo at left cuff for a signature look

Color: Light steel (gray)
Sleeve: Long

Pattern: Solid

A moisture-wicking, breathable pullover hoodie made from a cotton-poly blend for all-day comfort.

unique_selling_points: Features double dry technology and a two-ply hood for superior moisture management and warmth.
metadata.top_features:
Double Dry technology wicks moisture to keep you dry during activity
Two-ply hood provides extra warmth and coverage
1x1 rib knit sleeve cuffs and hem ensure a secure, comfortable fit
Front pouch pocket offers convenient storage
Embroidered Champion C logo at left cuff adds signature style
metadata.tech_specs:
Weight: 9 oz
Material: 50% US-grown cotton, 50% polyester
Alternative material: 40% cotton, 60% polyester (black poly)
Alternative material: 48% cotton, 52% polyester (silver grey)
Sleeve length: Long
Sizes: S, M, L, XL, XXL, XXXL
